od_description: Soura ↔ Maisuma / Lal Chowk (central Srinagar) via Munawar Abad and the old city — the N–S city spine. Busiest corridor in the dataset.
stops_verdict: Large, strongly corroborated stop set. Busiest 34.07494,74.82846 (4066 visits / 45 drivers ≈ TRC/Lal Chowk terminal); Soura end 34.1366,74.803 (2500/29); Maisuma/Budshah end 34.06546,74.80354 (1395/39). All top stops have 15-45 drivers = genuine boarding points. Two high-dwell points (341s @34.12044; 190s @34.08528) are layover, not stops.
narrative: The consolidated Soura↔central spine (this refined corridor absorbed the earlier Soura fragments — 211 runs / 32 drivers / 78 days). Terminal B geocodes to Maisuma (Budshah Bridge / Kothi Bagh), which adjoins Lal Chowk, so the endpoint match is FDR-050 'Soura to Lalchowk' even though 'Chanapora to Soura' has marginally higher trunk overlap (0.64) — Chanapora is the wrong (SW) far end. Same corridor JKRTC lists as e-bus Route 4 (TRC↔Soura via Nowhatta/Gojwara).
evidence_used: geocoded endpoints: Soura (A), Maisuma/Lal Chowk (B), Munawar Abad (mid)
FDR-050 'Soura to Lalchowk' = exact endpoint match (Maisuma ≈ Lal Chowk)
web (prior, same corridor): JKRTC e-bus Route 4 TRC↔Soura via Nowhatta
support: 211 runs, 32 drivers, 78 days — highest in dataset
data_quality_flags: implied_headway 377 min is a partial-adoption artifact, not real frequency
effective 11.4 km/h includes ~37% dwell; moving 18.2 km/h is the travel measure
